scripts.test: node scripts/check-suite-switcher-contract.mjs && node scripts/check-chrome-contract.mjs && node scripts/check-loading-contract.mjs && node scripts/check-venue-edition-contract.mjs && node scripts/check-content-truth.mjs && node --test scripts/migrate-venue-access-18-months.test.mjs scripts/migrate-access-sponsorship.test.mjs && node scripts/check-suiteloader-identity.mjs && tsx --test src/lib/hq/rooms.test.ts src/lib/hq/markdown.test.ts src/lib/hq/inbox.test.ts src/server/today/shape-native.test.ts src/lib/entitlements-db/pure.test.ts src/lib/entitlements-db/sponsorship-policy.test.ts src/lib/entitlements-db/webhook-lifecycle.test.ts src/lib/suite/contracts.test.ts src/lib/suite/contracts-v2.test.ts src/lib/suite/identity-adapter.test.ts src/lib/suite/lifecycle-coordinator.test.ts src/lib/suite/journey-certification.test.ts src/lib/suite/platform-contract.test.ts src/server/auth/suite-assertion.test.ts src/lib/commercial-terms.test.ts src/lib/venue-edition.test.ts src/emails/render.test.ts
